headline: AI for Personal Finance: Robo-Advisors, Automated Budgeting, and Financial Wellness
description: AI is democratizing financial advice -- from robo-advisors managing billions in portfolios to apps that automatically categorize spending and predict cash flow. What was once exclusive to wealth managers charging 1%+ fees is now available to anyone with a smartphone.

citation.name: AI in Personal Finance: Robo-Advisory, Automated Budgeting, and Financial Wellness Platforms (2024-2025 Survey)
Machine Learning for Automated Portfolio Management: Tax-Loss Harvesting, Rebalancing, and Goal-Based Optimization
